meta_title: Website for Kindergarten — Create in 5 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create a kindergarten website with AI in 5 minutes. Groups, programs, teachers, enrollment form. Attract parents. No code. Try Promto.
og_description: AI will create a kindergarten website in 5 minutes: groups, programs, teachers, enrollment form. No code. Try Promto.
hero_subtitle: AI will create a kindergarten site with groups and teachers — parents will find you in search.
hero_placeholder: Describe what website you need for your business...

advantages.title: Groups & Programs
advantages.description: Place information about groups, ages, developmental programs, and daily schedule.

advantages.title: Ready in 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe the kindergarten and its features — AI will create a site without programming or a designer.

advantages.title: Meet the Teachers
advantages.description: Add a section with educators: photos, experience, qualifications — parents trust people, not abstractions.

advantages.title: Visibility for Parents
advantages.description: Site is search-optimized — parents will find the kindergarten by queries like "kindergarten + district/city".

advantages.title: News & Events
advantages.description: News section allows sharing kindergarten events — open lessons, holidays, children's achievements.

advantages.title: Enrollment Form
advantages.description: Parents sign up for tours or submit enrollment applications directly through the site.

how_it_works.title: Describe the Kindergarten
how_it_works.description: Tell about the direction, groups, developmental programs, location, and kindergarten features.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Site
how_it_works.description: System generates a site with groups, teachers, programs sections, and enrollment form for parents.

how_it_works.title: Add Photos & Details
how_it_works.description: Upload photos of groups, territory, events — parents will see the kindergarten atmosphere.

how_it_works.title: Attract Parents
how_it_works.description: Publish the site and share the link — parents will start signing up for tours and enrollment.

faq.question: Can I specify multiple buildings or branches?
faq.answer: Yes. Specify addresses and contacts for all buildings — parents will choose the one nearest to them.

faq.question: Is there a section for news and events?
faq.answer: Yes. The news section allows publishing event announcements, holiday reports, and student achievements.

faq.question: Can I add a photo gallery?
faq.answer: Yes. The gallery supports uploading many photos — show the territory, groups, activities, and holidays.

faq.question: Is the site suitable for a private kindergarten?
faq.answer: Perfectly suitable. A personal website distinguishes a private kindergarten from competitors and builds parent trust.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. You describe your business, and the system creates a ready site in minutes without code.

faq.question: How much does a kindergarten website cost?
faq.answer: You can create a site for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and additional features.

cta_mid_subtitle: Create a kindergarten website in 5 minutes and start receiving applications from parents.
cta_final_subtitle: AI will create a site with groups and teachers. Free, no code, in 5 minutes.
